caption: The video appears to be an educational or informational presentation discussing the methods of source distribution under the GNU General Public License version 2 (GPLv2), specifically focusing on section 3. The slide outlines three choices provided by this section: option (a) mandates that the source code must accompany the binary, such as including a CD with the device; option (b) requires a written offer to provide the source upon request, which can be facilitated through a link to a download site or by distributing it on physical media while charging only for duplication costs; and option (c) clarifies that these requirements do not apply to commercial distribution. The presenter likely elaborates on each point, explaining the implications and practical applications of these distribution methods within the context of software licensing.
